title: marrubium × bastetanum var. negretense
intro: Marrubium × bastetanum var. negretense is a variant of the hybrid Marrubium plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including being a bitter and expectorant agent, which helps to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Marrubium × bastetanum var. negretense include its use in treating digestive problems, such as indigestion and constipation, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and pain. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, where its extracts can be utilized to support digestive health and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
